title: Get unexpected error when executing nested subquery
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t4 (id INT, ctime TIME, cbit BIT(32));
INSERT INTO t4 VALUES (1, NOW(), b'1');
CREATE TABLE t5 (col_int INT, col_bit BIT(32));
UPDATE t4 SET cbit = b'1' WHERE cbit IN (SELECT col_bit FROM t5 WHERE col_int IN (SELECT id FROM t4 WHERE ctime < '12:00:00' OR cbit IS NULL));
key_bug_features: Executing nested subquery with incompatible data types
